first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the textual differences in the justification, strengths, and concerns represent minor rephrasing and re-prioritization of the same facts from the resume. These changes are consistent with normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect a substantive shift in the evaluation. The model's assessment did not change despite the university being changed from a less prestigious one to a more prestigious one, indicating the difference was treated as noise.
